---
title: "Victoria code for pressure"
output: html_notebook
---

Load in libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(deldir)
library(nflfastR)
install.packages('zoo')
library(zoo)
```

Read in data
```{r}
# Load data efficiently
tracking_data <- read.csv('data/processed/bdb-tracking-all.parquet') 
plays <- read_csv("data/plays.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
players <- read_csv("data/players.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

```

Data cleaning
```{r}
head(tracking_data)
tracking_data <- tracking_data %>%
  filter(week %in% 1:5)

tracking <- tracking_data %>%
  left_join(players %>% select(nflId), by = "nflId")

week_play_ids <- tracking %>% distinct(gameId, playId)
```

Filter
```{r}
relevant_positions <- c("QB", "OL", "DL", "LB", "TE", "CB", "S")

compute_qb_area <- function(play_data) {
  snap_vals <- play_data$frameId[play_data$event == "ball_snap"]
  release_vals <- play_data$frameId[play_data$event %in% c("pass_forward", "qb_sack", "qb_spike")]

  if (length(snap_vals) == 0 || length(release_vals) == 0) {
    return(tibble(qb = NA_character_, max_neg_change = NA_real_))
  }

  snap_frame <- min(snap_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  release_frame <- min(release_vals, na.rm = TRUE)

  if (!is.finite(snap_frame) || !is.finite(release_frame)) {
    return(tibble(qb = NA_character_, max_neg_change = NA_real_))
  }

  play_data <- play_data %>%
    filter(frameId >= snap_frame, frameId <= release_frame)

  qb_name <- play_data %>%
    filter(officialPosition == "QB") %>%
    distinct(displayName) %>%
    pull() %>%
    paste(collapse = "/")

  frames <- unique(play_data$frameId)
  if (length(frames) < 6) {
    return(tibble(qb = qb_name, max_neg_change = NA_real_))
  }

  qb_areas <- map_dfr(frames, function(f) {
    frame_data <- play_data %>%
      filter(frameId == f, !is.na(x), !is.na(y)) %>%
      filter(officialPosition %in% relevant_positions) %>%
      distinct(x, y, .keep_all = TRUE)

    if (nrow(frame_data) < 3) return(tibble(frameId = f, qb_area = NA_real_))

    tryCatch({
      vor <- deldir(frame_data$x, frame_data$y)
      vor_df <- vor$summary %>%
        select(x, y, dir.area) %>%
        left_join(frame_data, by = c("x", "y"))
      qb_area <- vor_df %>%
        filter(officialPosition == "QB") %>%
        pull(dir.area)
      tibble(frameId = f, qb_area = ifelse(length(qb_area) > 0, qb_area, NA_real_))
    }, error = function(e) tibble(frameId = f, qb_area = NA_real_))
  }) %>%
    arrange(frameId) %>%
    mutate(rate_change = c(NA, diff(qb_area)))

  qb_areas <- qb_areas %>%
    mutate(rolling_avg = suppressWarnings(zoo::rollmean(rate_change, k = 5, align = "left", fill = NA)))

  max_neg <- suppressWarnings(min(qb_areas$rolling_avg, na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(max_neg)) max_neg <- NA_real_

  tibble(qb = qb_name, max_neg_change = max_neg)
}
```

Compute 
```{r}
five_weeks_summary <- tracking %>%
  group_by(gameId, playId) %>%
  group_modify(~compute_qb_area(.x)) %>%
  ungroup()


```

Merge with nflfastr
```{r}
pbp <- nflfastR::load_pbp(2021)
pbp <- pbp %>%
  mutate(playId = play_id) %>%
  select(playId, yards_gained) 

# Merge summaries for a week worth of games
final_week_summary <- five_weeks_summary %>%
  mutate(playId = as.numeric(playId)) %>%
  left_join(pbp, by = "playId") %>%
  filter(!is.na(max_neg_change), !is.na(yards_gained))
```

Plot
```{r}
ggplot(final_week_summary, aes(x = abs(max_neg_change), y = yards_gained)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, color = "lightcoral") +
  labs(
    title = " PRSS vs yards_gained",
    x = "PRSS",
    y = "yards_gained"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

Team summary
```{r}
team_summary <- final_week_summary %>%
  group_by(qb) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_yards_gained = mean(yards_gained, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_max_neg_change = mean(max_neg_change, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

ggplot(team_summary, aes(x = abs(avg_max_neg_change), y = avg_yards_gained)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Team Avg Yards Gained vs Avg PRSS",
    x = "Avg PRSS",
    y = "Avg Yards Gained"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

# Example: label top 3 and bottom 3 by avg_yards_gained
label_qbs <- team_summary %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_yards_gained)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 3) %>%
  bind_rows(
    team_summary %>% arrange(avg_yards_gained) %>% slice_head(n = 3)
  )

```

Binning
```{r}
# Bin the max_neg_change into evenly spaced intervals
binned_summary <- final_week_summary %>%
  mutate(bin = cut(abs(max_neg_change), breaks = seq(0, max(abs(max_neg_change), na.rm = TRUE), by = 2))) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_neg_change = mean(abs(max_neg_change), na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_yards_gained = mean(yards_gained, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Plot the binned data with a line
ggplot(binned_summary, aes(x = avg_neg_change, y = avg_yards_gained)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkred", size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Binned Avg Yards Gained vs Max Pocket Area Collapse",
    x = "Avg Max Negative Pocket Area Change (per bin)",
    y = "Avg Yards Gained"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# Linear model on binned data
lm_model <- lm(avg_yards_gained ~ avg_neg_change, data = binned_summary)
summary(lm_model)  # To view coefficients and R-squared

# Correlation coefficient
correlation <- cor(binned_summary$avg_neg_change, binned_summary$avg_yards_gained, use = "complete.obs")
print(paste("Correlation:", round(correlation, 3)))
```

```{r}
# Plot: just points + regression line
ggplot(binned_summary, aes(x = avg_neg_change, y = avg_yards_gained)) +
  geom_point(color = "darkred", size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue", size = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Regression on Binned Avg Yards Gained vs Pocket Area Collapse",
    x = "Avg Max Negative Pocket Area Change (per bin)",
    y = "Avg Yards Gained"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(binned_summary, aes(x = avg_neg_change, y = avg_yards_gained)) +
  geom_point(color = "darkred", size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "blue", fill = "lightblue", size = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Regression on Binned Avg Yards Gained vs Avg PRSS",
    x = "Avg PRSS (per bin)",
    y = "Avg Yards Gained"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

lm_fit <- lm(avg_yards_gained ~ avg_neg_change, data = binned_summary)
  summary(lm_fit)

plays_team <- plays %>% select(gameId, playId, possessionTeam)
```

Team level summary
```{r}
# Add team to final_week_summary
final_week_summary <- final_week_summary %>%
  left_join(plays_team, by = c("gameId", "playId"))

# Team-level summary
team_summary <- final_week_summary %>%
  group_by(possessionTeam) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_yards = mean(yards_gained, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_neg_change = mean(abs(max_neg_change), na.rm = TRUE),
    count = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_yards)) %>%
  mutate(
    yards_rank = rank(-avg_yards),
    pressure_rank = rank(avg_neg_change)
  )

team_rolling_summary <- final_week_summary %>%
  group_by(possessionTeam.x) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_max_neg_change = mean(max_neg_change, na.rm = TRUE),
    play_count = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(avg_max_neg_change)

team_rolling_summary <- team_rolling_summary %>%
  mutate(pressure_rank = rank(avg_max_neg_change))

ggplot(team_rolling_summary, aes(x = reorder(possessionTeam.x, avg_max_neg_change), y = abs(avg_max_neg_change))) +
  geom_col(fill = "tomato") +
  labs(
    title = "Avg PRSS by Team",
    x = "Team",
    y = "Avg Max Net Change"
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal()

```

Team + bin averages w outliers
```{r}
# 1. Bin max_neg_change and calculate team+bin averages
binned_team_summary <- final_week_summary %>%
  mutate(bin = cut(abs(max_neg_change), breaks = seq(0, max(abs(max_neg_change), na.rm = TRUE), by = 18))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(bin), !is.na(possessionTeam.x)) %>%
  group_by(possessionTeam.x, bin) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_neg_change = mean(abs(max_neg_change), na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_yards = mean(yards_gained, na.rm = TRUE),
    play_count = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 1. Add unique id to each row
binned_team_summary <- binned_team_summary %>%
  mutate(row_id = row_number())

# 2. Fit regression and compute residuals
lm_fit <- lm(avg_yards ~ avg_neg_change, data = binned_team_summary)
binned_team_summary <- binned_team_summary %>%
  mutate(residual = avg_yards - predict(lm_fit, newdata = binned_team_summary))

# 3. Find outlier row_ids
n_outliers <- 10
outlier_row_ids <- binned_team_summary %>%
  arrange(desc(residual)) %>% slice_head(n = n_outliers) %>%
  bind_rows(
    binned_team_summary %>% arrange(residual) %>% slice_head(n = n_outliers)
  ) %>%
  pull(row_id)

# 4. Flag outliers in the main table
binned_team_summary <- binned_team_summary %>%
  mutate(is_outlier = row_id %in% outlier_row_ids)

# 5. Plot: only outliers colored/labeled, rest gray
ggplot(binned_team_summary, aes(x = avg_neg_change, y = avg_yards)) +
  geom_point(
    data = binned_team_summary %>% filter(!is_outlier),
    color = "gray70",
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = binned_team_summary %>% filter(is_outlier),
    aes(color = possessionTeam.x),
    size = 2.5,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = binned_team_summary %>% filter(is_outlier),
    aes(label = possessionTeam.x, color = possessionTeam.x),
    size = 3,
    show.legend = FALSE,
    max.overlaps = 30
  ) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black", fill = "lightblue", size = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Avg Yards Gained per PRSS Bin (Only Outlier Teams Labeled & Colored)",
    x = "Avg PRSS (per 10-unit bin)",
    y = "Avg Yards Gained"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Outlier Team"))
```
